fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the invoice/credit memo line.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the invoice/credit memo line type.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the entry of the product.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity from the matched order or receipt/shipment line.

fields.name: Qty. Rcd. Not Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity received but not yet invoiced from the matched order or receipt/shipment line.

fields.name: Qty. to Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity to invoice from the matched order or receipt/shipment line.

fields.name: Qty. to Invoice (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the base quantity to invoice from the matched order or receipt/shipment line.

fields.name: Qty. Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity invoiced from the matched purchase order or receipt/shipment line.

fields.name: Qty. Invoiced (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the base quantity invoiced from the matched purchase order or receipt/shipment line.

fields.name: Receipt on Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the receipt is posted automatically with the invoice.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the order.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the order.

fields.name: Receipt/Shipment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the receipt or shipment.

fields.name: Receipt/Shipment Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the receipt or shipment.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's reference.

fields.name: Vendor Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's order number.

fields.name: Vendor Shipment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's shipment number.

fields.name: Vendor Invoice No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's invoice number.

fields.name: Vendor Cr. Memo No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's credit memo number.

fields.name: Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type, number, and line number of the matched order or receipt/shipment line.
